mapper.select: SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, title AS title, content AS content, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM notices WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY notice_id DESC
SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, title AS title, content AS content, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM notices WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
